title: wedelia montana var. wallichii
intro: Wedelia montana var. wallichii, also known as Wallich's Wedelia, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, commonly found in the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help in treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of Wedelia montana var. wallichii include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
